item.title: Scoreless after one period: Live updates from USA-Sweden men's hockey quarterfinals
item.description: Who will move on to the semifinals? Follow along here with goals and top moments from the Milan Cortina Games.

item.title: USA vs. Canada is the women's hockey rematch everyone was waiting for
item.description: How did both teams get here? Who are the players to watch? We break down some of the storylines as the two powers in women's hockey are set to go head...

item.title: How NHL GMs are handling the Olympic break
item.description: We spoke to execs around the league to learn what they're up to while many players are in Milan Cortina.

item.title: Women's Bracketology: Will Stanford miss the NCAA tournament again?
item.description: Teams with a high NET ranking are typically NCAA tournament locks. So why are the Huskers in the Last Four In?

item.title: Women's Power Rankings: How the Terps returned to the top 16
item.description: After riding a four-game losing streak into February, the Terps have turned it around, winning four in a row.
